# virtuacloud_limits (Data Source)

Retrieve resource usage and limits for the authenticated Virtua.Cloud account.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `limits` (Attributes) Resource limits for the account. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--limits))
- `usage` (Attributes) Current resource usage. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--usage))

<a id="nestedatt--limits"></a>
### Nested Schema for `limits`

Read-Only:

- `cloud_servers` (String) Maximum number of cloud servers allowed.
- `smtp_enabled` (String) Whether SMTP is enabled (1=enabled, 0=disabled).


<a id="nestedatt--usage"></a>
### Nested Schema for `usage`

Read-Only:

- `cloud_servers` (Number) Number of active cloud servers.
- `ip_address_v4` (String) Number of IPv4 addresses in use.
- `ip_address_v6` (String) Number of IPv6 addresses in use.
- `memory_size` (String) Memory size in MB in use.
- `root_space` (String) Root disk space in GB in use.
- `vcpus` (String) Number of vCPUs in use.
